item.name: Paneer Tikka
item.desc: Grilled cottage cheese cubes marinated in yogurt and aromatic spices, served with mint chutney

item.name: Chicken Tikka
item.desc: Tender chicken pieces in rich aromatic spice blend, char-grilled to perfection

item.name: Veg Spring Rolls
item.desc: Crispy golden rolls filled with seasoned fresh vegetables and herbs

item.name: Seekh Kebab
item.desc: Juicy minced mutton kebabs on skewers, seasoned with ginger, garlic, and garam masala

item.name: Paneer Butter Masala
item.desc: Soft paneer cubes simmered in a rich tomato-butter gravy with cream and kasuri methi

item.name: Chicken Biryani
item.desc: Aromatic long-grain basmati rice layered with spiced chicken, saffron, and caramelised onions

item.name: Dal Makhani
item.desc: Slow-cooked black lentils in a velvety butter and tomato sauce, finished with fresh cream

item.name: Butter Naan
item.desc: Soft leavened flatbread baked in a tandoor oven, brushed generously with salted butter

item.name: Mutton Rogan Josh
item.desc: Kashmiri-style slow-cooked mutton in a bold, deeply spiced aromatic gravy

item.name: Veg Biryani
item.desc: Fragrant basmati rice cooked with seasonal vegetables, whole spices, and fresh herbs

item.name: Cold Coffee
item.desc: Chilled espresso blended with milk, ice cream, and chocolate syrup

item.name: Mango Lassi
item.desc: Alphonso mango blended with creamy yogurt, chilled and lightly sweetened

item.name: Masala Chai
item.desc: Spiced Indian tea brewed with ginger, cardamom, and fresh milk

item.name: Fresh Lime Soda
item.desc: Freshly squeezed lime with sparkling water, mint, and a touch of salt or sugar

item.name: Gulab Jamun
item.desc: Soft fried milk-solid dumplings soaked in rose-cardamom sugar syrup, served warm

item.name: Rasgulla
item.desc: Spongy cottage cheese balls cooked in light sugar syrup, chilled and refreshing

item.name: Chocolate Brownie
item.desc: Warm fudgy dark chocolate brownie served with a scoop of vanilla bean ice cream

item.name: Samosa
item.desc: Crispy pastry filled with spiced potatoes and green peas, served with tamarind chutney

item.name: Chicken Sandwich
item.desc: Grilled chicken breast with fresh lettuce, tomato, and herb mayo on toasted bread

item.name: Masala Fries
item.desc: Golden crispy fries tossed in a signature Indian spice blend with chaat masala
